_publications._publicationTitle: Fibroblasts Attenuate Anti-Tumor Drug Efficacy in Tumor Cells via Paracrine Interactions with Tumor Cells in 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Cultures.

_contextSnippet: pNF1 tumor cells treated with fibroblast-derived conditioned media exhibited significantly higher Pgp levels than those treated in control media
details: Successfully detected elevated P-glycoprotein expression in tumor cells treated with fibroblast-derived conditioned media and in parallel cocultures
